name: ai-organiser
description: Automatically analyze note content and add relevant tags using AI (with Chinese interface support)

scripts.build: npm run test:all && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.build:quick: npx tsc -p tsconfig.build.json -noEmit && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.test:all: npx tsc -p tsconfig.build.json -noEmit && vitest run && node scripts/automated-tests.js
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: Nie Hu
